extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout attacked solo from a strong breakaway on white road sector, distancing chasers with superior gravel handling
tactical_patterns: Van Aert's cyclocross background provided decisive advantage on technical white road sectors over pure road specialists.
Breakaway containing legitimate contender forced standoff in peloton, exploitable when team dynamics unclear with unknown riders.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: attacked decisively after bridging effort showed superior recovery on gravel compared to breakaway companions
